dialogue_text: It has been many years since anyone asked me to see Oz,
source_excerpt: "It has been many years since anyone asked me to see Oz," he said, shaking his head in perplexity. "He is powerful and terrible, and if you come on an idle or foolish errand to bother the wise reflections of the Great Wizard, he might be...
